name: Runtime artifacts stay out of committed changes
instruction: Committed changes must not include Dark Factory or Tessl review runtime artifacts under `.tessl/dark-factory/` or `.tessl/review-results/`.
relevant_when: Diff that adds or modifies repository files, especially files under `.tessl/` or changes to ignore rules and CI commit steps.
context: Runtime artifacts are per-run evidence and should be uploaded or ignored rather than committed to the repository.
scope_reason: The violation is visible from the changed path list and diff, not from one source file.

checklist.name: no-dark-factory-artifacts
checklist.rule: The diff does not add or modify files under `.tessl/dark-factory/`.

checklist.name: no-review-result-artifacts
checklist.rule: The diff does not add or modify files under `.tessl/review-results/`.

checklist.name: runtime-artifacts-remain-ignored
checklist.rule: Ignore rules or commit scripts still prevent `.tessl/dark-factory/` and `.tessl/review-results/` artifacts from being committed.
